headline: Winners And Losers Of Q1: Hilton (NYSE:HLT) Vs The Rest Of The Consumer Discretionary - Travel and Vacation Providers Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who didn’t). Let’s take a look at how consumer discretionary - travel and vacation providers stocks fared in Q1, starting with Hilton (NYSE:HLT).
